content.en:
Ye Tian stayed here for a long time with the Lord of the Boundary, and then he left and returned to the end of the realm.

"This time I have gained a lot, not only have I obtained a large amount of resources, but I have also obtained the information of the Origin Ancestor realm and the Void Inscription Technique from the Lord of the Unbounded!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, the Void Inscription Technique was a secret technique that only needed to impact the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and there was no need for him to cultivate it now.

At the moment, the most important thing for him is to comprehend the Extreme Path, to raise one Extreme Path to the Perfection Realm, and then to master the Extreme Path.

This time, he found a lot of treasures containing the Extreme Extreme Dao in the Ten Directions Black Domain, all of which helped him cultivate.

Moreover, he has found a lot of resources, and it can be said that there is no shortage of resources for a long time.

"Then let's go all out to retreat and cultivate!"

Ye Tian decided.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian, with the help of one Extreme Dao Monument, gradually raised one Extreme Dao to the realm of perfection.

Then, Ye Tian began to copy a variety of treasures containing the Extreme Extreme Dao, and used these treasures to comprehend the Extreme Dao, first comprehending the Extreme Dao to the Perfection Realm, and then impacting the Extreme Extreme Dao realm.

Gradually, Ye Tian mastered one extreme path after another.

Time flies, and hundreds of billions of eternal years have passed unconsciously.

At this moment, Ye Tian had already mastered more than thirty extreme extreme realms and more than one hundred perfection realms, which were unimaginable realms for other ancestors!

If the Lord of the Boundless knew that Ye Tian had mastered so many extreme extreme paths, he would definitely be dumbfounded!

"Over the years, my cultivation has been raised to the limit of the perfect controller of the True Realm, and the Will Pagoda has also condensed to the thirteenth layer, and I can't continue to improve!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that he has now risen to the true limit of the perfect controller of the True Realm, and he can't improve even a little more.

Now, if he wants to improve his strength, he can only impact the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller Realm, that is, the Origin Ancestor Realm.

"My Endless Extreme Dao has completely stepped into the Perfection Realm under the feedback of so many Extreme Extreme Paths and Consummation Extreme Daos, and I can break through!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Primordial Black Sea, inside the dojo.

Ye Tian broke through the retreat here, and the energy of the Primordial Black Sea was the purest and most powerful energy, which was enough for him to quickly break through to the Primordial Ancestor realm.

Soon, Ye Tian began to use the Endless Extreme Dao of the Consummation Realm to promote the transformation of his Extreme Dao True Body and become the Extreme Dao Extreme Body.

Rumble!!!

The shackles were easily shattered by Ye Tian, and countless primordial black sea energy poured into Ye Tian's body, quickly helping him complete the transformation of his body.

As time passed, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and his strength became stronger and stronger as he got older!

After a long time, Ye Tian completely completed the breakthrough and became a first-class ancestor.

After a long time, Ye Tian stabilized the realm of the original ancestor.

"I have finally become a first-tier ancestor, and I only need to improve my cultivation to become a second-tier ancestor!"

After all, if you want to become a double ancestor, you need to comprehend the extreme space-time pole, and Ye Tian has already comprehended it, but his cultivation has not yet been reached.

As for improving one's cultivation, it can be done with a little more resources and time.

Moreover, once he becomes a Dual Ancestor, he can definitely be almost invincible among the Dual Ancestors, and even no less than the weaker Triple Ancestor.

After all, he had comprehended too many extreme extreme paths, and his foundation was incomparably strong, so he was naturally not comparable to ordinary ancestors.

......

No Road Tower.

After Ye Tian's copied body was re-replicated, he came back as a reprimordial ancestor.

At this time, the Lord of the Daoless was shocked one by one.

"Endless Lord, you broke through?"

The Lord of the Ancient was shocked.

This is too fast, and the Lord of the Ancient also knows that Ye Tian has always wanted to use his own extreme path to break through, so this time he must also cultivate his own extreme path to the consummation realm.

And it is very difficult to break through after his own extreme path is complete, but Ye Tian broke through so quickly, which was really beyond his expectations.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

The Lord of the Ancients, the Lord of the Daoless, the Lord of the Sword Pole, and the Lord of the Eternal Night congratulated.

"Lucky breakthrough!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

The four tower masters smiled slightly, knowing that Ye Tian was modest.

At this time, the Lord of the Pathless Dao was curious: "Lord of Endless, you have broken through now, how about you and I have a contest?"

The Lord of the Daoless is also a warmonger, Ye Tian did not break through before, he was naturally embarrassed to talk to Ye Tian, but now that Ye Tian has broken through, he can't help it.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian nodded.

However, he really didn't feel that the Lord of the Pathless was his opponent, if he really went all out, he could kill the Lord of the Pathless in one move.

After all, he has comprehended so many extreme paths, and the master of the Daoless has not comprehended all the extreme paths, strictly speaking, the master of the Daoless is not a heavy ancestor, but can only be regarded as a pseudo-ancestor.

An area of the end of the world.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Void Dao came here, ready to start talking.

"Lord of the Daoless, let's take action!"

Ye Tian said.

In an instant, the Lord of the Pathless Dao burst out with all his might, a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, the Void Great Demon Hand.

However, this blow hit Ye Tian directly.

Ye Tian waved his hand and directly shattered the attack of the Lord of the Daoless Dao.

Next, the Lord of the Pathless kept attacking, but he couldn't help Ye Tian, and Ye Tian stopped the attack of the Lord of the Pathless Path lightly.

"Lord of Endless, attack me, don't keep defending!"

The Lord of the Pathless said.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian cast an extremely mangling sword light and slashed away with a sword.

The sword was too fast, and beyond the comprehension of the Lord of the Pathless.

Before he could react, one of his arms dissipated, and the nearby void was directly annihilated.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's mercy, he would have fallen directly.

"This ......"

The Lord of the Senseless was stunned.

The Lord of the Ancient Beings was also stunned, Ye Tiancai had broken through to the realm of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, it was so terrifying, he already had the strength to kill the Lord of the Daoless in seconds!

"Ye Tian, have you comprehended the Extreme Dao?"

The Lord of the Pathless asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

Several tower masters gasped, Ye Tian actually really comprehended the Extreme Dao.

The Lord of the Ancient Realm revealed his body, and he actually had some guesses, because Ye Tian had asked him to trade a treasure containing the Extreme Extreme Dao before, if he hadn't comprehended the Extreme Extreme Dao, why didn't he want those treasures?

But he didn't ask, he didn't expect Ye Tian to really comprehend the Extreme Extreme.
